title: Xeneon Edge Hub — Tier-0 user-widget manifest (manifestVersion 1)
description: Schema for manifest.json in $XDG_DATA_HOME/xeneon-edge-hub/widgets/<dir>/. Normative prose: docs/widgets/manifest-spec.md. Unknown top-level keys are ignored by version-1 hubs (reserved for future versions).

manifestVersion.description: Manifest contract version. This schema describes exactly version 1.

type.description: Unique widget id, namespaced under 'user.' so it can never collide with a shipped type. Shipped types always win a collision anyway.

title.description: Display name (picker, tile header, expanded view).

description.description: One-line description (expanded-view header, config About section).

entry.description: The widget's QML file: a plain file name inside the widget directory (no path separators, no '..').

icon.description: Optional picker icon: a plain .svg or .png file name inside the widget directory, rendered untinted. Absent or missing on disk → a neutral fallback glyph.

sizes.description: The sizes this widget can honestly render, from the 7-name vocabulary in ui/qml/WidgetSizes.qml. A size is (short x long) on a ROTATING screen — declaring one claims the widget works in both of its physical shapes. Declaring '1x1' (the baseline) is strongly recommended.

dflt.description: Size a fresh instance gets; must be listed in `sizes`. Defaults to '1x1' if declared, else the smallest declared size.

defaults.description: Seed settings for a fresh instance (JSON object).

config.description: Config-form fields, rendered by the same panel as shipped widgets. Every declared field must be honoured by the widget.

key.description: Settings key the widget reads. 'title', 'accent' and 'cardBackdrop' are reserved. Required for every type except 'info'.

label.description: Display label. Required for every type except 'info'.

dflt.description: Default value; keep it equal to the widget's own fallback for the key.
